json-logger:logger.doc:name: DEBUG: Sales Order details to Entry
json-logger:logger.message: Sales Order details Sub Flow Started

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { isSuccess: payload.successful, apiName: Mule::p('api.name'), apiVersion: Mule::p('api.version'), traceId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as DateTime, message: "Success", sfResponse: write(payload,"application/json") } as Object {encoding: "UTF-8", mediaType: "application/json"}

json-logger:logger.doc:name: DEBUG: Sales Order details to Exit
json-logger:logger.message: Sales Order details Sub Flow Completed
